# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_virtualhub (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the VirtualHub.
- `resource_group` (String) The resource group name of the VirtualHub.

### Optional

- `address_prefix` (String) Address-prefix for this VirtualHub.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `azure_firewall` (String) The azureFirewall associated with this VirtualHub.
- `bgp_connections` (String) List of references to Bgp Connections.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enable_virtual_router_route_propogation` (Boolean) Flag to control route propogation for VirtualRouter hub.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `express_route_gateway` (String) The expressRouteGateway associated with this VirtualHub.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ip_configurations` (String) List of references to IpConfigurations.
- `location` (String) The location of the VirtualHub.
- `p2_s_vpn_gateway` (String) The P2SVpnGateway associated with this VirtualHub.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `route_table` (String) The routeTable associated with this virtual hub.
- `security_partner_provider` (String) The securityPartnerProvider associated with this VirtualHub.
- `security_provider_name` (String) The Security Provider name.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `sku` (String) The sku of this VirtualHub.
- `state` (String) Assert the state of the VirtualHub. Use `present` to create or update an VirtualHub and `absent` to delete it.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `virtual_hub_route_table_v2_s` (String) List of all virtual hub route table v2s associated with this VirtualHub.
- `virtual_router_asn` (Number) VirtualRouter ASN.
- `virtual_router_ips` (String) VirtualRouter IPs.
- `virtual_wan` (String) The VirtualWAN to which the VirtualHub belongs.
- `vpn_gateway` (String) The VpnGateway associated with this VirtualHub.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
